mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_USER_BADGE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_USER_BADGE (ID, USER_ID, BADGE_ID) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{badgeId})
mapper.select: SELECT ID, USER_BADGE_CREATE_AT, USER_ID, BADGE_ID FROM TBL_USER_BADGE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY USER_BADGE_CREATE_AT DESC, ID DESC
